calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION as to John Montes is GRANTED. The levying officer is directed to withhold $200. every pay period. The Court will prepare the written order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Off Calendar
